title: Make ':' a restricted character for file names
body:
file names for podman load, save, export, and import cannot
contain ":" in them. It is a reserved character for parsing
filenames.

Fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/489

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @umohnani8 travis isn't happy, looks like something wonky in the logs test maybe?  Might be worth rerunning to see if it's a flake or not.
@umohnani8 I think I just fixed the travis issues, but I think you need to rebase your PR to fix it.
Tests green apart from internal error in Fedora CI. Ready to merge. @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat @mheon PTAL
